error.signature: HTTPError: 401 Client Error: Unauthorized for url: huggingface.co

verdict.summary: Attempting to access a gated model without accepting license or providing auth token.

dead_ends.action: Use a mirror site or unofficial copy of the model
dead_ends.why_fails: Unofficial copies may be tampered with, outdated, or violate the model license

dead_ends.action: Create a new Hugging Face account to bypass the gate
dead_ends.why_fails: You still need to accept the license agreement on the new account

workarounds.action: Accept the model license on the model page, then use auth token
workarounds.how: 1. Visit huggingface.co/{model} and accept license. 2. huggingface-cli login. 3. Re-run.
export HF_TOKEN=hf_xxxxx  # or add to .env file
